Traffic Pros Monthly Featuring Bret Gregory
Jon: 	Hello. It’s Jon Benson with 3X Marketing Formula, 3XVSL.com, and the 3X VSL
Generator. We’re back with another issue of Traffic Pros Monthly. Today I’ve got a
great guest with me. This is someone I’ve been using for my own traffic. He’s got
some really clever Facebook ideas that he’s going to share with you guys today.
We’re actually doing this with video. Normally I do audios only. But his stuff is a
perfect example of first of all why we need to do video probably more often. Second
of all, the power that you can have with Facebook using some really specific target
oriented strategies. We’re going to talk about that today.
So let me give you an overriding picture here of what this looks like, so you can get

be a traffic expert, because if you have a really good a sales video, traffic will find
you.
That being said I decided to experiment on having more traffic like purchasing traffic,
and actually trying all kinds of different things. From free traffic, to this is very

because obviously you always want more traffic. You don’t have to give away so
much of your income.
The a great thing about video sale letters is I can make a lot of money from video sale

So I decided to make a whole series. You guys are in on it, obviously Traffic Pros

So today I have with me gunning Bret Gregory. Bret has got a very clever way of

started using it. Our first time out of the gate, we have an ROI positive experience.

but we had to come up with another 1.2 in 12 months to pay off the rest of the

So in real estate buying ads in the New York Times, doubling your commissions to

I said, “There has got to be some customers in there.” Now we only had 7 pieces of

So I said, “You know what, there’s got to be 7 customers there.”
Now keep in mind our lowest cost piece of property was $150,000. So this is

I know a lot of people out there that are bragging about 1 cent fans and whatever. 3

-- 10 of 32 --

Take a look now at my other website. So my other website, remember we were doing
Costa Rica Wellness community. We also have a website called Costa Rica Yoga,
where we market and sell about $2,500 yoga retreats.
Every one we actually sell we get about 500 bucks. Is that a lower price point product
but it’s actually a tangible product. So where people are actually going to go on a trip.
But look at how many likes we have on our blog. So right now you go to
CostaRicaYoga.org, you click on blog, you’re going to see 102,000 likes.
Jon: 	Wow.
Bret: 	Yeah I don’t any other blog in the world that has that many likes. What that does for
us is we’ve been driving targeted traffic to this website for a few years with this exact
concept called the article stack.
What the article stack means is that we’re using a cumulative effect of the Facebook
like counter. That’s what this big green arrow is showing you. That’s called a
Facebook like counter. Every time we drive targeted traffic to the website, when a
new person comes on and they see it, they click the like button, we get a cumulative
effect.
So here’s why this is really important. This is a mistake that almost everybody makes
on their blog. I don’t want you to make this mistake. Almost everybody when they
put up a blog, I don’t care whether it’s video, or articles, or whatever you’re doing.
They put up a blog they make a mistake and their web guys who install the Facebook
like button or widget. It always starts with zero likes.
Well the first time we did our article stack, it did start with zero likes. But every time
we post a new blog, we don’t have a new unique Facebook URL. We use the same
Facebook URL or the Facebook like counter each time.
What that does for us is it gives us a cumulative effect of the Facebook like button.
I’ll just go back live now; I want to show you the quick simple little demonstration.
So here is the blog and I posted this just late last night just to show you guys an
example. So here’s the blog, and if you click on this link it’s going to take you to our
blog on our webpage.
So you can see this is the photo album stack. It will take just a second to load up here
if Firefox is going to cooperate with me. Oh wait we’re on the, I included another link
in there. So this is the right thing. This is the one that we want. Right there, 5,408
people like this.
Traffic Pros Monthly | Bret Gregory | 3XVSL.com/traffic 	Page 10 of 31

So what happens is now we’re driving targeted traffic from those 200,000 to 230,000
almost 250,000 fans, all 250,000 are not going to come to my website. That’s not
250,000 customers, that’s 250,000 fans. I’m going to filter my customers out of there
by using the article stack to drive targeted traffic.
It’s as simple as this. So whenever we post a new blog, you’ll notice that there’s only
one like button on my blog. So I scroll down here. This is last week’s blog, no like
buttons. Scroll down here, the week before, no like button. There’s only one like
button at the top. That’s how we can collect accumulative number of likes.
So as we drive targeted traffic that number keeps growing. We can then I filter out my
customers there. So, some number of those people are going to fill out this form,
name and email, click to get instant access button. Then they go through my sales
funnel.
So you were mentioning, we were talking about traffic. I don’t get tons of traffic. So

kind of sales have we generated from that. That is $6,534 in sales in just 30 days.

Well if you never spoke to your customers first how do you know exactly what they
want? A lot of people make the mistake of saying, well this is something that I would

The best thing that you can possibly do is talk to your customers first. This is such a
great side effect and side benefit that you can talk with your prospective customers
before they every become customers. You can ask them questions like, what's your
biggest frustration.
